levels.label: Actively Harmful
levels.description: Fellow creates problems, unreliable, negative impact on operations
examples: Fellow promised a report by Monday, still hasn't delivered by Friday
Team members complain about Fellow's attitude
Process implemented by Fellow actually slowed down production

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.description: Fellow struggles with basics, needs constant supervision and direction
characteristics: Completes work but often late or incomplete
examples: Fellow needs to be told what to do each day
Work is done but often needs corrections
Shows up on time but doesn't take initiative

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.description: Fellow is reliable, completes assigned work, professional conduct
examples: Fellow does what is asked, when it's asked
Reports are accurate and submitted on time
Team finds Fellow helpful and cooperative

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.description: Fellow takes initiative, improves systems, creates visible business impact
examples: Fellow identified a bottleneck and redesigned the workflow
Production team now follows Fellow's tracking system
Supervisor can point to specific improvements made by Fellow

levels.label: Exceptional
levels.description: Fellow transforms operations, builds lasting systems, exceptional leadership
characteristics: Creates systems that work without Fellow present
examples: Fellow built an inventory system the company still uses
OTD improved from 60% to 85% under Fellow's guidance
Team members have grown into new roles because of Fellow's mentoring

assessment_dimensions.name: Reliability & Consistency
assessment_dimensions.description: Does the Fellow complete work on time? Can the supervisor depend on them?

assessment_dimensions.name: Work Quality
assessment_dimensions.description: Are deliverables high quality? Do they need rework?

assessment_dimensions.name: Initiative & Ownership
assessment_dimensions.description: Does the Fellow take charge or wait for instructions?

assessment_dimensions.name: Systems Building
assessment_dimensions.description: Is the Fellow creating sustainable processes or just doing tasks?

assessment_dimensions.name: Team Integration
assessment_dimensions.description: How does the existing team respond to the Fellow?

assessment_dimensions.name: Communication
assessment_dimensions.description: Is the Fellow clear, proactive, and professional in communication?

assessment_dimensions.name: Problem-Solving
assessment_dimensions.description: Can the Fellow diagnose issues and propose solutions?

assessment_dimensions.name: Business Impact
assessment_dimensions.description: Is Fellow's work connected to measurable business outcomes?
